textQuery.description: The text query for the search

includedType.description: Restrict results to a specific place type

regionCode.description: The region code for biasing results

maxResultCount.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-20)

openNow.description: Return only places that are currently open

minRating.description: Filter results to those with at least this rating

strictTypeFiltering.description: If true, only return results that match the includedType exactly
